1.0.22.en: Code review fixes: remove unused handlers, sanitize object IDs, use adapter timers, test on all platforms

1.0.22.es: Correcciones de revisión: handlers no utilizados eliminados, IDs de objetos saneados, temporizadores del adaptador, pruebas en todas las plataformas

1.0.21.en: Fix: clean up obsolete states from previous versions on adapter start

1.0.20.en: Code: SSDP port hardcoded to 1900 (removed config fallback)

1.0.19.en: Admin UI: SSDP port field removed (fixed at 1900 — all UPnP clients require this port)
